title: Letters Never Delivered
content: Inside an old wooden box, Olivia kept dozens of letters she had written but never mailed. Some were filled with apologies she had been too proud to send. Others described ordinary moments she wished she could have shared with Noah after they drifted apart. Writing became her way of preserving conversations that no longer had a destination. One rainy afternoon, she opened the box and read every page again. Instead of feeling regret, she noticed how her words had changed over the years. The earliest letters were desperate to change the past, while the latest ones quietly accepted it. She realized the letters had never truly been written for Noah. They had been written for the person she was slowly becoming. Some messages never reach another heart because their real purpose is to heal the one that writes them.
